vue-components.name: APopover
vue-components.description:
Props for the APopover root. Wraps `reka-ui`'s `PopoverRootProps`
unchanged. Declared as an `interface … extends` (instead of a `type` alias)
so consumers can declaration-merge to layer custom props later without a
breaking export rename.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: The open state of the popover when it is initially rendered. Use when you do not need to control its open state.

props.name: modal
props.description: The modality of the popover. When set to true, interaction with outside elements will be disabled and only popover content will be visible to screen readers.

props.name: open
props.description: The controlled open state of the popover.

events.name: update:open
events.description: Event handler called when the open state of the popover changes.

props.name: as
props.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwritten by `asChild`.

props.name: asChild
props.description:
Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

Read our [Composition](https://www.reka-ui.com/docs/guides/composition) guide for more details.

props.name: align
props.description:
The preferred alignment against the trigger.
May change when collisions occur.

props.name: alignFlip
props.description:
Flip alignment when colliding with boundary.
May only occur when `prioritizePosition` is true.

props.name: alignOffset
props.description: An offset in pixels from the `start` or `end` alignment options.

props.name: arrowPadding
props.description:
The padding between the arrow and the edges of the content.
If your content has border-radius, this will prevent it from
overflowing the corners.

props.name: as
props.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwritten by `asChild`.

props.name: asChild
props.description:
Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

Read our [Composition](https://www.reka-ui.com/docs/guides/composition) guide for more details.

props.name: avoidCollisions
props.description:
When `true`, overrides the side and align preferences
to prevent collisions with boundary edges.

props.name: collisionBoundary
props.description:
The element used as the collision boundary. By default
this is the viewport, though you can provide additional
element(s) to be included in this check.

props.name: collisionPadding
props.description:
The distance in pixels from the boundary edges where collision
detection should occur. Accepts a number (same for all sides),
or a partial padding object, for example: { top: 20, left: 20 }.

props.name: disableOutsidePointerEvents
props.description:
When `true`, hover/focus/click interactions will be disabled on elements outside
the `DismissableLayer`. Users will need to click twice on outside elements to
interact with them: once to close the `DismissableLayer`, and again to trigger the element.

props.name: disableUpdateOnLayoutShift
props.description: Whether to disable the update position for the content when the layout shifted.

props.name: forceMount
props.description:
Used to force mounting when more control is needed. Useful when
controlling animation with Vue animation libraries.

props.name: hideShiftedArrow
props.description:
When `true`, hides the arrow when it cannot be centered
to the reference element.

props.name: hideWhenDetached
props.description: Whether to hide the content when the trigger becomes fully occluded.

props.name: overlay
props.description:
Dim the entire viewport behind the popover and block all interaction with the
page (clicks are captured by the overlay). Pair with `<APopover :modal="true">`
(the default) for the full modal behaviour.

props.name: overlayLockScroll
props.description:
When true, the overlay also locks page scroll via `body { overflow: hidden }`.
Off by default — `AResponsivePopover` opts in to this when `scrollLock="body"`.

props.name: positionStrategy
props.description: The type of CSS position property to use.

props.name: prioritizePosition
props.description:
Force content to be position within the viewport.

Might overlap the reference element, which may not be desired.

props.name: reference
props.description:
The custom element or virtual element that will be set as the reference
to position the floating element.

If provided, it will replace the default anchor element.

props.name: side
props.description:
The preferred side of the trigger to render against when open.
Will be reversed when collisions occur and avoidCollisions
is enabled.

props.name: sideFlip
props.description: Flip to the opposite side when colliding with boundary.

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: The distance in pixels from the trigger.

props.name: sticky
props.description:
The sticky behavior on the align axis. `partial` will keep the
content in the boundary as long as the trigger is at least partially
in the boundary whilst "always" will keep the content in the boundary
regardless.

props.name: updatePositionStrategy
props.description: Strategy to update the position of the floating element on every animation frame.

events.name: closeAutoFocus
events.description:
Event handler called when auto-focusing on close.
Can be prevented.

events.name: escapeKeyDown
events.description:
Event handler called when the escape key is down.
Can be prevented.

events.name: focusOutside
events.description:
Event handler called when the focus moves outside of the `DismissableLayer`.
Can be prevented.

events.name: interactOutside
events.description:
Event handler called when an interaction happens outside the `DismissableLayer`.
Specifically, when a `pointerdown` event happens outside or focus moves outside of it.
Can be prevented.

events.name: openAutoFocus
events.description:
Event handler called when auto-focusing on open.
Can be prevented.

events.name: pointerDownOutside
events.description:
Event handler called when a `pointerdown` event happens outside of the `DismissableLayer`.
Can be prevented.

vue-components.name: APopoverOverlay
vue-components.description:
Props for APopoverOverlay — the optional dim layer behind a popover.
Wrapper-only (no reka-ui parent), so the shape is defined entirely here.

props.name: lockScroll
props.description:
When true, set `body { overflow: hidden; touchAction: none }` for the lifetime of
the overlay. Off by default because it breaks `position: sticky` on the host page.
Prefer the event-based lock (see `AResponsivePopover`'s `scrollLock` prop) which
keeps the page scrollbar in place.
